creator: robak@freebsd.org
text: Are you sure you're using the latest version of the port? I've just tested it on all supported OS versions and cant reproduce your issue. Please, verify your port svn revision is 383418 and that your ports tree and OS are up to date and supported (that is, 10.1, 9.3 or 8.4) and try to paste the logs showing the build issue.
